mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM member_address t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.id},'%')
AND t.member_id like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.memberId},'%')
AND t.consignee like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.consignee},'%')
AND t.phone like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.phone},'%')
AND t.province like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.province},'%')
AND t.city like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.city},'%')
AND t.area like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.area},'%')
AND t.address like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.address},'%')
AND t.is_default like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.isDefault},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.status},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM member_address t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.id},'%')
AND t.member_id like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.memberId},'%')
AND t.consignee like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.consignee},'%')
AND t.phone like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.phone},'%')
AND t.province like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.province},'%')
AND t.city like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.city},'%')
AND t.area like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.area},'%')
AND t.address like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.address},'%')
AND t.is_default like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.isDefault},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.status},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{memberAddressEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM member_address t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
